/usr/bin/c++ -O3 -DNDEBUG -Wl,--dependency-file=CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_minimal.dir/link.d CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_minimal.dir/main.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_minimal.dir/MyGame.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_minimal.dir/MovementSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_minimal.dir/SpawnerSystem.cpp.o CMakeFiles/threadmaxx_minimal.dir/ConsoleRenderer.cpp.o -o threadmaxx_minimal  ../../libthreadmaxx.a
